flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Medanos College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($570 → $738).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Medanos College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Los Medanos College rose 187% between 2007 and 2010 (3.0k → 8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Los Medanos College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).
